components_analyzed.reason: AIX 7.2 standard support has ended; only extended support available. IBM has shifted focus to newer AIX and Power platform versions.
COBOL-2014 is the current ISO/IEC standard for COBOL. Mainframe COBOL compilers (GnuCOBOL, IBM Enterprise COBOL) continue to support the 2014 standard actively.
Oracle 19c is the long-term release with Premier Support through April 2024 and Extended Support through April 2027. Currently under extended support with full patches available.
